hero.subtitle: Providing quality, affordable, and reliable waste collection services across Western Macedonia.

about.heading: A leading waste management company dedicated to sustainable solutions for a greener world.

pillars.title: Our Vision
pillars.body: A North Macedonia where waste is managed responsibly at every level — from households to industrial sites — creating cleaner public spaces for generations to come.

pillars.title: Our Mission
pillars.body: To provide quality, affordable waste collection services that communities can depend on. Punctual pickups, clear communication, and a genuine commitment to the environment.

pillars.title: Our Work
pillars.body: From dumpster rentals and garbage pickups to full demolition waste removal, we handle every job with the same standard — whether a single household or a large construction site.

about_page.h1: Committed to a cleaner North Macedonia.
about_page.subtitle: Eco Living is a waste management company serving municipalities, businesses, and households across the Western Macedonia region — delivering reliable, affordable, and environmentally responsible collection services.
about_page.pull_quote: We believe proper waste management isn't a luxury — it's a foundation for healthy communities. Since our founding, we have worked alongside local governments, private companies, and residents to build systems that actually work: punctual pickups, clear communication, and a genuine commitment to reducing environmental impact.
about_page.values_heading: Our vision, mission, and work ethic.

values.title: A greener future for every community.
values.body: We envision a North Macedonia where waste is managed responsibly at every level — from households to industrial sites — creating cleaner public spaces and a healthier environment for generations to come.

values.title: Reliable service, delivered with care.
values.body: Our mission is to provide quality, affordable waste collection and management services that communities can depend on — showing up on time, treating every client with respect, and continuously improving how we operate.

values.title: Hands-on, local, and accountable.
values.body: From dumpster rentals and garbage pickups to full demolition waste removal, we handle every job with the same standard of professionalism — whether it is a single household or a large construction site across the region.

about_page.services_heading: Three core services, one reliable team.

services.title: Garbage Pickup
services.body: Scheduled and on-demand waste collection for homes, businesses, and municipalities throughout the region.

services.title: Dumpster Rental
services.body: Short and long-term container rental for construction sites, renovations, and large-scale cleanouts.

services.title: House Demolition
services.body: Safe, compliant demolition and debris removal handled by an experienced local crew.

about_page.cta_heading: Let's build a cleaner solution together.
about_page.cta_body: Whether you need a recurring pickup schedule or a one-off container, reach out and we will get back to you within 24–48 hours.

contact_page.h1: We're here when you need us.
contact_page.subtitle: Reach out by phone or email — we respond within 24–48 hours and are happy to discuss any waste management need, big or small.
contact_page.form_sub: Fill in the form and a member of our team will get back to you shortly.
contact_page.map_heading: Based in Gostivar, serving the region.
contact_page.map_body: We operate across the Western Macedonia region, covering Gostivar, Chegrane, Brvenitsa, and Želino.
contact_page.social_text: Follow us on social media for updates and project highlights.

services.heading: Our Best Solutions
services.subtitle: Three core services built around reliability, transparency, and environmental responsibility.
services.label: Services

items.title: Garbage Pickup
items.description: Scheduled and on-demand waste collection for homes, businesses, and municipalities. Reliable, punctual, and priced fairly.

items.title: Dumpster Rental
items.description: Short and long-term container rental for construction sites, renovations, and large-scale cleanouts across the region.

items.title: House Demolition
items.description: Safe, compliant demolition and debris removal handled by an experienced local crew with full site cleanup.

map.heading: We Completed Waste Management Across 3 Regions

partners.heading: Trusted by 100+ companies.
partners.subtitle: We work with municipalities, construction firms, and private companies across the region.

garbage_pickup.title: Reliable Waste Collection, Every Time.
garbage_pickup.subtitle: We provide scheduled garbage pickup for homes and businesses throughout North Macedonia — consistent, affordable, and environmentally responsible.
garbage_pickup.blurb: Waste collection shouldn't be something you have to think about. Our team ensures your garbage is picked up on time, every time, properly sorted and delivered to certified processing facilities — so you can focus on what matters.
garbage_pickup.cta_heading: Ready to set up a collection schedule?
garbage_pickup.cta_body: Whether you're a household looking for regular pickup or a business managing large volumes, we'll put together a plan that works for you.

features.title: Scheduled Weekly Collection
features.description: Reliable, on-time pickup on a schedule that fits your household or business. No missed days, no delays — we show up when we say we will.

features.title: Sorted & Separated Waste
features.description: We collect general waste, recyclables, and organic waste separately — supporting proper processing at certified facilities across the region.

features.title: Flexible Pickup Timeframes
features.description: Morning or afternoon windows available. We work around your schedule so waste collection never disrupts your day.

features.title: Residential & Commercial
features.description: From single households to large office complexes, our fleet and capacity scale to meet any volume of waste collection.

dumpster_rental.title: The Right Container for Any Job.
dumpster_rental.subtitle: Short-term or long-term dumpster rental for construction, renovation, events, and commercial cleanouts — delivered fast, picked up on demand.
dumpster_rental.blurb: Big projects generate big waste. Our container rental service gives you the space you need, exactly where you need it. We handle delivery, pickup, and responsible disposal — so your site stays clean and your project stays on schedule.
dumpster_rental.cta_body: Tell us the size you need, where to drop it, and for how long. We'll handle everything else and have it at your site within 24 hours.

features.title: Multiple Container Sizes
features.description: From compact 6 m³ containers for home renovations to 30 m³ industrial units for construction sites — we have the right size for every job.

features.title: Fast Delivery & Pickup
features.description: Container delivered to your location within 24 hours of booking. When you're done, we pick it up promptly — no waiting, no hassle.

features.title: Flexible Rental Periods
features.description: Rent by the day, week, or month. Extend your rental with a single call — no penalties, no paperwork.

features.title: Responsible Disposal
features.description: All collected waste is transported to certified sorting and disposal facilities. Recyclable materials are separated and processed appropriately.

house_demolition.title: Safe, Clean Demolition From Start to Finish.
house_demolition.subtitle: Professional structural demolition for residential and commercial properties — with full debris removal, site cleanup, and permit assistance included.
house_demolition.blurb: Demolition is more than knocking walls down. It requires careful planning, the right equipment, and a responsible approach to what happens to the materials after. Our team manages the entire process — from permits to the final site cleanup — so you start your next project on solid ground.
house_demolition.cta_body: Get in touch and we'll assess your site, walk you through the process, and provide a clear quote. No surprises, no hidden costs.

features.title: Full Structural Demolition
features.description: Complete teardown of residential and small commercial structures, carried out safely and efficiently by our experienced crew.

features.title: Permits & Documentation
features.description: We assist with securing the necessary permits and ensure all demolition work complies with local regulations in North Macedonia.

features.title: Debris Removal & Site Cleanup
features.description: Once demolition is complete, we remove all debris and leave the site clean and cleared — ready for your next construction phase.

features.title: Safe & Insured Operation
features.description: All demolition is carried out with full insurance coverage, proper safety equipment, and strict protocols to protect your property and our crew.
